market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: Negative aggregate GEX (-6.02B) creates unstable conditions. Dealers short gamma will amplify moves, particularly on downward breaks.
outlook.summary: Market is in a short gamma regime with heavy put concentration anchoring support at 630. Spot (641.42) is trapped between immediate support at 640 and the 0DTE Max Pain magnet at 645. Break of 640 triggers volatility expansion.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest alignment across Weekly (144k) and Monthly (116k) expiries defines the primary structural support.
Significant Monthly Put OI (101k) combines with high 0DTE volume friction to create immediate support below spot.
0DTE Max Pain level acting as an aggressive price magnet just above current spot to minimize option payouts.
Key resistance defined by Call OI in 0DTE (17k) and Monthly (15k) expiries. Breaks above target Max Pain.
Weekly and Monthly Call walls align to form the upper boundary of the dealer hedging zone.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low/Suppressed: Positive total GEX (0.75B) indicates dealers are long gamma, actively suppressing volatility and favoring mean reversion.
outlook.summary: Price is pinned exactly at the 0DTE Gamma Flip (568.09), creating a state of equilibrium. Despite negative gamma in weekly/monthly expiries, the dominant positive total GEX suggests dealers will aggressively fade moves. Watch for magnetic pull toward Max Pain at 566.0.

levels.motivazione: Spot price is exactly aligned with the 0DTE Gamma Flip. This is the critical equilibrium point defining the intraday trend.
0DTE Max Pain level is <0.5% away. Strong magnetic attraction for market makers to expire options worthless.
Confluence: Major resistance. 0DTE shows high Call OI (16k) and Monthly shows massive Put OI (37k) creating a 'Gamma Trap' ceiling.
Confluence: Structural support. High Put OI in both 0DTE (14k) and Monthly (32k) defines the downside risk boundary.
Secondary 0DTE resistance with extremely high volume (26k) indicating aggressive selling pressure.
